alt.zh-TW: Video Family LoRA Hub 的 mock-safe demo 錄影。
alt.en: Mock-safe demo recording of Video Family LoRA Hub.

caption.zh-TW: 展示多模型影片生成與身份 LoRA pipeline 的操作台、manifest、artifact browser 與架構狀態。
caption.en: Shows the product console, manifest, artifact browser, and architecture states for the multi-model video and identity LoRA pipeline.

alt.zh-TW: Video Family LoRA Hub mock-safe 產品操作台與 pipeline state。
alt.en: Video Family LoRA Hub mock-safe product console and pipeline state.

caption.zh-TW: 第一屏直接展示 run composer、pipeline stage、mock-safe backend 與 smoke 指標。
caption.en: The first viewport shows the run composer, pipeline stages, mock-safe backend, and smoke metrics.

alt.zh-TW: YAML manifest 與 resolved execution graph。
alt.en: YAML manifest and resolved execution graph.

caption.zh-TW: 用一份 demo manifest 串接 t2v、i2v、v2v 與 source job dependency。
caption.en: A demo manifest chains t2v, i2v, v2v, and source-job dependencies.

alt.zh-TW: Run artifact browser，顯示 metadata、preview、run summary。
alt.en: Run artifact browser showing metadata, preview, and run summary.

caption.zh-TW: 每次執行輸出 metadata、config snapshot、preview 與 summary，方便重現與展示。
caption.en: Each run writes metadata, config snapshots, previews, and summaries for reproducibility and review.

alt.zh-TW: Video Family LoRA Hub 系統架構摘要。
alt.en: Video Family LoRA Hub system architecture summary.

caption.zh-TW: Registry、Pydantic config、adapters、ComfyUI templates、trainer bridges 與 artifacts 的層級關係。
caption.en: Layered view of registry, Pydantic config, adapters, ComfyUI templates, trainer bridges, and artifacts.

metadata.projectType: Portfolio-ready AI video generation and identity LoRA workflow lab
capabilities: mock-safe demo mode without GPU, model weights, API keys, or external services
text-to-video, image-to-video, and video-to-video run orchestration
manifest-driven batch pipelines with source-job chaining
reproducible artifacts with metadata and config snapshots
static GitHub Pages demo with screenshots and WebM walkthrough
